caption: A formal committee meeting takes place in a room with wood-paneled walls and several people seated at a long table. A bald man in a dark suit and glasses rests his chin on his hand, appearing thoughtful. Beside him, a man with a grey beard and glasses wearing a dark suit and tie looks toward the center of the room. Other attendees include a woman in a dark floral top and a man in a grey vest. On the table are water bottles, glasses, and various papers. On-screen text includes the "ORCA" logo and a banner reading "April 12, 2019 House Committee on General, Housing, and Military Affairs S.23 Increasing the Minimum Wage". Across the sequence, the man with the beard shifts his posture, moving from leaning back with his hand near his chest to sitting more upright. The camera remains stationary, capturing a candid moment of the attendees listening.
